entries.text: When you see someone you know, you can say hello and use their name. You can say "Hi!" or "Hello!" and smile. If they say hello first, you can say hello back. That is a friendly way to start.
question_hints: What to say when I see a friend

entries.text: When you leave or someone else leaves, you can say goodbye. You can say "Bye!" or "See you later!" and wave. Saying goodbye nicely helps the other person know you had a good time.
question_hints: What to say when I leave

entries.text: When you want something, say "please." When someone gives you something or helps you, say "thank you." Saying please and thank you shows you are kind and it makes others feel good.
question_hints: When do I say thank you

entries.text: When you play or talk with others, take turns. That means you do something, then the other person does something. Waiting for your turn can be hard, but it is fair and everyone gets to play.
If you bump into someone or do something by mistake, you can say "Sorry" or "I did not mean to." Saying sorry shows you care. The other person might say "That is okay."
When someone is talking to you, try to listen. Look at them or face them. Do not talk over them. When they finish, you can answer or ask a question. Listening shows you respect them.
question_hints: What to do when someone talks

entries.text: If you want to join someone’s game or talk, you can go near them and say something like "Can I play too?" or "Hi, what are you doing?" If they say no, that is okay; you can find something else to do.
question_hints: How do I ask to play

entries.text: Sometimes we feel sad. That is okay. You can tell a grown-up or a friend "I feel sad." They might give you a hug or sit with you. Doing something you like or resting can also help.
question_hints: I feel sad what do I do
Who can I tell when I am sad

entries.text: When you feel angry, try to calm your body first. You can take slow breaths, count to five, or step away for a moment. Then you can say how you feel: "I feel angry because..." and ask for what you need.
question_hints: What do I do when I am angry
